results.rendered_html: dhūmrāSva m. ‘having dark horses’, N. of a son of Su-candra (son of Hemacandra) and father of Sṛñjaya,  R. ;  VP.  (cf. ˚rākza).

results.rendered_html:
dhūmrāśva (dhūmra + aśva) m. N. pr. eines Sohnes des Sucandra (Sohnes des Hemacandra) und Vaters des Sṛñjaya  R. 1,47,14 . 15  ( GORR.  48,16 ).  VP. 354 .  LIA. I, Anh. XVI. 
— Vgl. dhūmrākṣa.
